name: Natural Opening Out Movement
preceding_figure_names: Alemana, Natural Top, Opening Out To Right And Left, Rope Spinning, Three Alemanas
following_figure_names: Basic Movements: Open (4-6), Basic Movements: Closed (4-6), Underarm Turn To R, Fan (4-6), Reverse Top
notes: Man turns 1/8 L on 3 to contact position, placing LF in front of RF as Cuban Cross. Lady turns an additional 1/8 on 3 to end with RF back and slightly side

steps.action: Step to side in RSP with slight body turn to the right
Close left foot to right foot, ending in Closed Position with slight body turn to the left
comments: Slight body turn to L to normal position

steps.action: Step back in RSP with half turn to the right
Step forward and slightly across left foot, turning to end side in Closed Position with 1/4 turn left, then another 1/4 left
steps.amount_of_turn: 1/4 to L then another 1/4 to L
